changes: Onboarding navigation is now free-form: progress dots on every step are clickable, skippable pages (like permissions) never block moving forward, granted permissions no longer force you to the next page, and your answers are saved when you revisit a step

Right-aligned the remaining Settings dropdowns (voice, voice model, AI provider, system audio, focus cooldown), made the daily summary time picker glide with a native stepper, and slimmed the voice speed value label
Cleaned up the onboarding permission screens — removed the repeated explainer sentence on each step and mentioned voice notes alongside meetings on the microphone step
Fixed the onboarding Disk Access, Accessibility, and Automation pages not noticing an already-granted permission until the grant button was clicked
Fixed onboarding repeatedly asking to quit and reopen Omi after granting permissions — the reopen prompt now appears once, only when a Screen Recording grant actually needs it
Your "how did you hear about Omi" answer is now saved to your account, not just this device
Fixed onboarding opening System Settings (and the drag helper) for Screen Recording and Disk Access even when the permission was already granted
Cleaned up the onboarding "How did you hear about Omi?" options so they appear in a consistent order with "Other" last
Ask Omi now tells you when it couldn't see your screen (Screen Recording off or Omi needs a reopen) instead of answering blind
The onboarding name field starts blank when sign-in provided no name, instead of pre-filling the literal text "there"
The drag-to-grant helper card now also appears when Screen Recording is denied, matching the Full Disk Access flow
Onboarding exports step now says "Export Omi context to the tools you already use" with Export buttons instead of Connect
Improved desktop chat recovery after a temporary service error
Onboarding progress is now four phase segments that fill page by page — hover a segment to reveal and jump to its individual pages
Omi Beta is now a separate app that can be installed and run alongside stable Omi
Improved recovery when your Agent VM database needs to be restored
Improved recovery when an agent VM starts with an incomplete local database
Fixed onboarding pages showing the previous account's answers after deleting an account or signing out on the same Mac
Prevent Omi Desktop from quitting when a local diagnostic log write fails, while preserving the failure details for later crash diagnosis

Fixed Notch resizing across Spaces, kept tool progress in compact collapsed groups, added a clear Home control to main chat, made regular and Notch chat fade naturally into a lighter composer, reduced main-chat header whitespace, made discovered skills compact and searchable without injecting CLAUDE.md, let active tools reach their own progress timeout before recovering a silent chat bridge, and kept Push-to-Talk speaking when current-screen capture is temporarily unavailable.
Fixed onboarding arrow-key navigation dying partway through the flow (from the Ask a question shortcut step onward)
Improved macOS beta release retries so an already-qualified candidate can still be promoted if the original promotion request fails.
Fixed Home memory and task totals not refreshing after changes, and added a way to load older conversations
Improved Desktop reliability diagnostics for PTT, chat, crashes, and feedback while keeping cloud reports privacy-safe and redacted.
